content:
Common Story Types in This Genre
• The Rise and Fall Story (Raging Bull, The Wrestler) → Character reaches greatness, only to be consumed by their own obsession.
• The Redemption Arc (Real, The Pianist) → A broken character must rediscover their purpose.
• The Rivalry Narrative (Whiplash, Amadeus) → Protagonist faces a rival who challenges their worldview.
• The Spiritual Warrior Journey (Vagabond) → Learning that mastery is not about external power, but internal growth.

🔥 Next Steps:
• Choose a fourth film to study in depth.
• Refine your protagonist’s archetype and narrative shape.
• Expand your story’s structure based on one of the story types above.

Would you like a scene-by-scene breakdown of any of these films to analyze structure further?
context: From document: Analyzing the Common Threads in Whiplash, Real, and Vagabond — chunk 14 (chunk 14/14)
